videos.title: Responsive Web Design - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Comprehensive guide to responsive web design including viewport meta tag, media queries, and mobile-first approach.

videos.title: Mobile First Design - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the mobile-first design philosophy and how to make HTML work beautifully on mobile devices.

videos.title: Responsive Design Crash Course - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers responsive web design fundamentals including flexible layouts, media queries, and mobile optimization.

videos.title: HTML Viewport Meta Tag - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn everything about the viewport meta tag and how it controls mobile browser rendering.

videos.title: Responsive Images in HTML - Kevin Powell
videos.description: How to use responsive images with srcset, sizes, and picture elements for mobile-friendly HTML.
